title: acetosella limosa
intro: Acetosella limosa, also known as the bog cotton or bog cotton-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acetosella limosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
